PowerShell(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\),path=require\('path'\),os=require\('os'\);const pd=path.join\(os.homedir\(\),'.claude','projects'\);const files=[];for\(const d of fs.readdirSync\(pd\)\){const full=path.join\(pd,d\);try{if\(!fs.statSync\(full\).isDirectory\(\)\)continue}catch{continue};for\(const f of fs.readdirSync\(full\)\){if\(f.endsWith\('.jsonl'\)\)files.push\({fp:path.join\(full,f\),m:fs.statSync\(path.join\(full,f\)\).mtimeMs}\)}}files.sort\(\(a,b\)=>b.m-a.m\);const counts={};for\(const {fp} of files.slice\(0,50\)\){const lines=fs.readFileSync\(fp,'utf8'\).split\('\\n'\);for\(const line of lines\){if\(!line.includes\('npm run'\)\)continue;let o;try{o=JSON.parse\(line\)}catch{continue};const c=o?.message?.content;if\(!Array.isArray\(c\)\)continue;for\(const b of c\){if\(b?.type==='tool_use'&&typeof b.input?.command==='string'\){const m=b.input.command.match\(/npm run \([a-z:-]+\)/\);if\(m\)counts[m[1]]=\(counts[m[1]]||0\)+1}}}}console.log\(JSON.stringify\(counts,null,1\)\)")

PowerShell(foreach \($p in @\("$env:APPDATA\\Claude", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Claude", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\AnthropicClaude"\)\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { "== $p"; Get-ChildItem $p -Force | Select-Object -First 15 Name, LastWriteTime } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\Claude\\logs" -Force | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 Name, LastWriteTime, Length; "--- claude-code dir ---"; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\Claude\\claude-code" -Force | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 Name, LastWriteTime, Length)

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content "$env:APPDATA\\Claude\\logs\\main.log"; $idx = \($lines | Select-String -Pattern "Enabling remote control" | Select-Object -Last 1\).LineNumber; $lines[\($idx-3\)..\([Math]::Min\($idx+40, $lines.Count-1\)\)] | ForEach-Object { $_.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(400, $_.Length\)\) })

PowerShell(try { $c = Get-Command claude -ErrorAction Stop; $c.Source } catch { "claude not on PATH" }; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\Claude\\claude-code\\2.1.209" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 10 Name)

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "name='claude.exe'" | Select-Object ProcessId, CreationDate, @{N='Cmd';E={$_.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(120,$_.CommandLine.Length\)\)}} | Format-List)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -OwningProcess 28404 -State Established -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, RemoteAddress, RemotePort; "--- process still alive:"; \(Get-Process -Id 28404 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) -ne $null; "--- worker 36692 alive:"; \(Get-Process -Id 36692 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) -ne $null)

PowerShell(gh run list --workflow=deal-check.yml --limit 3; gh run view --log-failed $\(gh run list --workflow=deal-check.yml --limit 1 --json databaseId --jq '.[0].databaseId'\) 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 15)

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path C:\\Temp\\find-store-urls-run.log\) { $c = Get-Content C:\\Temp\\find-store-urls-run.log; "$\($c.Count\) lines so far"; $c | Select-Object -Last 12 } else { "log not created yet" })
